channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Lechen Zhang

item.title: Incorporating Metric Depth Learning into Neural Radiance Fields
item.description: ECBM 4040 Course Project at Columbia University, 2023.

item.title: Implicit Neural Evolution with LLM Supervision

item.title: RoboBIM: An Autonomous Building Information Modelling System
